title: Maxim LED Round Small Edison Screw Cap (Ses) Bulbs, E14, 6 W, Warm White, Pack of 10
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
description: Product Description Maxim pack of 10-25 years average rated life, A+ rated. Small Edison screw cap (SES) LED lamp provides warm white light instantly at the flick of a switch, offering immediate savings in power usage and lifespan. Clean and elegant anti-shatter design. The ideal replacement for traditional incandescent or halogen candle lamps. Size L = 75 mm D = 45 mm. Non-dimmable. Box Contains 10 x Maxim ® 6W (40W Equivalent) Round Small Edison Screw, Warm White Light Bulb, Frosted
